name: xquik
description: X data automation guidance for using Xquik docs, SDKs, REST API, MCP, webhooks, and public source examples.

interface.shortDescription: Use Xquik docs and public examples for X data automation.
interface.longDescription: Xquik provides REST API, SDK, MCP, webhook, and skill guidance for X data automation workflows. This plugin routes agents to public Xquik docs, the published x-developer package, and public source examples while keeping secrets in user-managed environment configuration.
defaultPrompt: Use Xquik to plan an X data automation workflow.
Use Xquik docs to wire the REST API or SDK.
Use Xquik to review an X data integration.
